items.headline: Anthropic absorbs the SDK generation team
items.body: Stainless builds tooling that generates idiomatic client SDKs from OpenAPI specs — they're the team that maintains Anthropic's Python and TypeScript SDKs. Acquiring them means Anthropic owns that pipeline directly. For ADO MCP Server, this is a quiet signal that the Anthropic Python SDK gets more active maintenance and won't accumulate workarounds in the async interface.
